title: SQLancer calc.abs undefined
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO t1 (id, value) VALUES (1, '100'), (2, '200'), (3, NULL), (4, 'abc');
CREATE TABLE t2 (num DOUBLE, text VARCHAR(100));
SELECT CAST(VAR_SAMP(ABS(CAST(value AS SIGNED))) AS SIGNED) FROM t1 GROUP BY CAST(value AS SIGNED), value;
key_bug_features: Using abs() on a VARCHAR column
